case_title: KONICA MINOLTA VS. ORANGE LEGAL TECHNOLOGIES LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KONICA MINOLTA AS TO DEFENDANT ORANGE LEGAL TECHNOLOGIES LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DOES 1 THRU 50, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-30-2012
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KONICA MINOLTA SERVED AUG-29-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ORANGE LEGAL TECHNOLOGIES LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-02-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KONICA MINOLTA AS TO DEFENDANT ORANGE LEGAL TECHNOLOGIES LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY
RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE AND REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE FILED BY PLAINTIFF KONICA MINOLTA
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-02-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KONICA MINOLTA AS TO DEFENDANT ORANGE LEGAL TECHNOLOGIES LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-20-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THRU 50, INCL.
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF PRE-JUDGMENT INTEREST CALCULATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF KONICA MINOLTA

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $605.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT ORANGE LEGAL TECHNOLOGIES LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KONICA MINOLTA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ORANGE LEGAL TECHNOLOGIES LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $11,460.96 PRINCIPAL, $1,000.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,623.38 INTEREST, $605.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,689.34, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-20-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF KONICA MINOLTA
